content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the car positioned slightly left of center on a westward heading, and the dashed center line is visible curving left — the car appears on course but needs to follow the left curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 47, target = (47 + 5) % 121 = 52
- Target WP52: (4.8824, 2.7846)
- Car: x=5.6593, y=2.5865, heading=-171.82°
- dy = 2.7846 - 2.5865 = 0.1981
- dx = 4.8824 - 5.6593 = -0.7769
- bearing = atan2(0.1981, -0.7769) = 180° - atan2(0.1981, 0.7769) = 180° - 14.31° = 165.69°
- delta = 165.69° - (-171.82°) = 337.51° → normalize: 337.51 - 360 = -22.49°
- |delta| ≈ 22° → moderate right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP52 is still to the right (delta=-22°), so a moderate right correction is needed to align with the waypoint line as the car continues westward.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track heads west around WP46-52, then curves left (southwest) toward WP55+",
    "Car is left of center (0.18m) on westward section — consistent right delta to WP52",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on moderate curves; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Delta around -22° on this section requires steering_angle=-15",
    "After WP52, track curves sharply left heading southwest — prepare to steer left",
    "Heading wraps near ±180° when traveling west — normalize delta carefully",
    "Car has been consistently left of center on westward section, right correction ongoing",
    "WP52+ marks start of left curve heading southwest, left steering needed soon"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.949, 5.859, 5.760, 5.659],
    "y": [2.656, 2.637, 2.610, 2.587],
    "yaw": [174.70, -179.76, -174.33, -171.82]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP52 at (4.882, 2.785): dy=0.198, dx=-0.777, bearing=165.7°, delta=-22.5° → moderate right, steer -15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
